summary: This is a brief announcement post for The Talk Show Live from WWDC 2019, recorded at The California Theater in San Jose. Gruber hosted Apple executives Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak to discuss the news from the conference. The post serves primarily as a pointer to the podcast episode rather than containing substantive written analysis. It includes sponsor acknowledgments from MacStadium, OmniFocus, and Slack.
key_points: The Talk Show Live was recorded at The California Theater in San Jose during WWDC 2019
Guests were Apple SVPs Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak, two of Apple's most prominent public-facing executives
The post is a podcast episode listing rather than a written analysis piece
money_quotes: Recorded in front of a live audience at The California Theater in San Jose on Tuesday, 4 June 2019, John Gruber is joined by Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak to discuss the news from WWDC 2019.
key_insight: This is a podcast episode announcement for Gruber's annual tradition of hosting Apple executives on The Talk Show Live during WWDC week, with no substantive written commentary to analyze.
